title: LifeSmart SUBLIME Panel Ultra (Dune Gold) SLMU8C01
description:
The Ultra Series measures 316×170mm and features the all-new SUBLIME OS, for seamless control of lighting, shading, environment, security, and audio- visual-all accessible from a single touch display. Additionally, it offers AirTalkTM intercom and offline voice for added convenience.
Adapter: 1. For 220V power supply, an additional order of Sublime Actuator 2-Channel Switch (11.0116220) or Sublime Actuator 4-Channel Switch (11.016240) is required.  
2. If 12V or 24V power supply is self-provided, an additional order of Sublime CoTP Communication Adapter (11.016920) is necessary.  
3. For installation on SUBLIME display boards, order the 70.001440 USB power cable. Customers need to self-provide a powered USB 5V/2A adapter. | Notes: Cover Dimensions：316*170 mm(Touchable screen 12.3-inch, IPS LCD，1920*720)
Panel Mounting Projection: 20.5mm
Mounting Method：The screen and cover are fixed to the flange by magnetic attraction , Flange fixed to one or two rows or three rows of 86 cartridges
Wireless CoSS: Supported by the device
availability: Catalogue information under review / availability under review
